text: Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. We're excited to have your support with upcoming events!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable to our newer members!
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Please check the mod guidelines before starting.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to introduce yourself and jump into the conversations!
